description:
The player appears to have more information than what is on screen. The cheater seems to have walls and a macro for recoil. The cheater appears at other opposing players through walls and locks onto them as shown in the clip. As seen in the clips, the player locks onto multiple players and on one of the opposing player's head.

The scoreboard is provided in the clip. Also, a video is provided showing evidence of the players real username using the r6tracker overlay.
